parameters.jsCode: return items;

const profile = $json.profile || {};
const site = $json;
const list = (arr) => (arr && arr.length ? arr.map(x => `- ${x}`).join('\n') : '- none');

// ── CONTENT AGENT MODE (Orchestrator dispatch with research brief) ──────────
if ($json.research_brief || $json.variation_seed) {
  const { seo_context, media_context, research_brief, variation_seed } = $json;

  const mediaStr = (media_context || []).map(m =>
    `- ${m.type.toUpperCase()}: "${m.title}" (${m.url}) — ${m.summary}`
  ).join('\n') || 'No recent media items.';

  const researchStr = research_brief ? `
APPROVED TOPIC: ${research_brief.recommended_topic || research_brief.novel_angle || '(see brief)'}
NOVEL ANGLE: ${research_brief.novel_angle || 'not specified'}
AEO QUESTIONS TO ADDRESS:
${(research_brief.aeo_questions || []).map(q => `  - ${q}`).join('\n')}
CITABLE SOURCES (use these only, do not fabricate):
${(research_brief.citable_sources || []).map(s =>
  `  - ${s.title} | ${s.publication} | ${s.date} | ${s.url}`
).join('\n')}
` : 'No research brief provided — use site profile and media context only.';

  const openingMap = {
    narrative:        'Open with a brief narrative or personal observation relevant to the topic.',
    question:         'Open with a specific, direct question that the content will answer.',
    direct_statement: 'Open with a clear, confident factual or opinion statement.',
    data_point:       'Open with a specific statistic or data point, cited from the sources provided.',
  };
  const seed = variation_seed || { opening_type: 'direct_statement', target_word_count: 500, heading_depth: 2 };

  const prompt = `You are the Content Agent for the Reputation Engine.
Return only valid YAML.
Hard rules:
- Never output the word "undefined"
- Never leave any field empty
- The first line must be exactly: site:
- Do not output markdown, code fences, commentary, HTML, or any text before/after the YAML
- Keep output role-pure for this site — do not cross topic boundaries
- Respect forbidden topics exactly

Site: ${site.domain} (site_id: ${site.site_id || site.slug})
Role: ${profile.role || 'N/A'}
Allowed topics: ${list(profile.allowed_topics)}
Forbidden topics: ${list(profile.forbidden_topics)}
Author: Dr. Sina Bari, MD
Author URL: https://sinabarimd.com/about

VARIATION INSTRUCTIONS:
- ${openingMap[seed.opening_type] || openingMap.direct_statement}
- Target word count for article/insight content: approximately ${seed.target_word_count} words (±15%)
- Use ${seed.heading_depth} levels of heading hierarchy
- Vary paragraph lengths — mix short and long

CONTENT DIRECTION:
${researchStr}

MEDIA CONTEXT (reference where relevant, do not fabricate):
${mediaStr}

SEO CONTEXT:
${seo_context || 'No SEO alerts this week.'}

MANDATORY REQUIREMENTS:
- Include at least one contextual link to https://sinabarimd.com (satellite sites only)
- Include a 3-5 item FAQ section addressing the AEO questions above (in writing.cards or a standalone field)
- Include the author byline: "Dr. Sina Bari, MD"
- Do not fabricate citations — only reference sources listed above

Preserve exactly:
- site.slug: ${site.slug}
- site.canonical_url: ${site.canonical_url}
- site.display_name: ${site.display_name}
- site.contact_email: ${site.contact_email}
- site.hero.headshot_src: ${site.headshot_src}
- site.hero.headshot_alt: ${site.headshot_alt}

Required YAML structure:
site:
  slug: string
  canonical_url: string
  display_name: string
  title: string
  meta_description: string
  contact_email: string
  hero:
    eyebrow: string
    headline: string
    lead: string
    primary_cta_text: string
    primary_cta_href: string
    secondary_cta_text: string
    secondary_cta_href: string
    headshot_src: string
    headshot_alt: string
  about:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    paragraphs:
      - string
      - string
  focus:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    cards:
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
  background:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    paragraphs:
      - string
      - string
  writing:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    cards:
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
  network:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    body: string
  footer:
    heading: string
    body: string`;

  return [{ json: { ...site, prompt } }];
}

// ── ORIGINAL MODE (Manual trigger / no research brief) ───────────────────────
const roleSpecificRules = {
  identity_hub: [
    '- Emphasize entity clarity, biography, current work, and branded query ownership.',
    '- Do not turn this into a generic blog homepage.'
  ],
  ai_authority: [
    '- This site is NOT the canonical identity hub.',
    '- Do not write a long biography-driven homepage.',
    '- The homepage must read as a healthcare AI thought-leadership property.',
    '- Use healthcare AI, workflow, governance, diagnostics, validation, and adoption language.',
    '- Do not mention plastic surgery, aesthetics, patient services, consultations, or local practice claims.'
  ],
  editorial: [
    '- This site should feel like an editorial publication, not a clinic or consulting page.'
  ],
  legacy_specialty: [
    '- This site should remain about legacy aesthetics / surgery expertise and should not contain healthcare AI content.'
  ]
};

const prompt = `
Return only valid YAML.
Hard rules:
- Never output the word "undefined"
- Never leave any field empty
- If unsure, generate a conservative placeholder that stays within profile rules
- The first line must be exactly: site:
- Do not output markdown
- Do not output code fences
- Do not output commentary
- Do not explain anything
- Do not output HTML
- Do not output any text before or after the YAML
- Keep the output role-pure for this site
- Do not clone another owned site's homepage
- Do not reuse biography-heavy copy unless this site is the identity hub
- Respect forbidden topics exactly

Site context:
- domain: ${site.domain}
- canonical_url: ${site.canonical_url}
- display_name: ${site.display_name}
- contact_email: ${site.contact_email}
- site_role: ${site.site_role}

Role:
${profile.role || 'N/A'}

Objective:
${profile.objective || 'N/A'}

Positioning:
${profile.positioning || 'N/A'}

Allowed topics:
${list(profile.allowed_topics)}

Forbidden topics:
${list(profile.forbidden_topics)}

Primary keywords:
${list(profile.primary_keywords)}

Content types:
${list(profile.content_types)}

Core pages:
${list(profile.core_pages)}

Tone:
- credible
- restrained
- expert
- clear

Role-specific rules:
${(roleSpecificRules[site.site_role] || []).join('\n') || '- none'}

Instructions:
Generate structured YAML content for ${site.domain}.

Preserve exactly:
- site.slug: ${site.slug}
- site.canonical_url: ${site.canonical_url}
- site.display_name: ${site.display_name}
- site.contact_email: ${site.contact_email}
- site.hero.headshot_src: ${site.headshot_src}
- site.hero.headshot_alt: ${site.headshot_alt}

Required structure:
site:
  slug: string
  canonical_url: string
  display_name: string
  title: string
  meta_description: string
  contact_email: string
  hero:
    eyebrow: string
    headline: string
    lead: string
    primary_cta_text: string
    primary_cta_href: string
    secondary_cta_text: string
    secondary_cta_href: string
    headshot_src: string
    headshot_alt: string
  about:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    paragraphs:
      - string
      - string
  focus:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    cards:
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
  background:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    paragraphs:
      - string
      - string
  writing:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    cards:
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
      - title: string
        body: string
  network:
    eyebrow: string
    heading: string
    body: string
  footer:
    heading: string
    body: string
`;

return [{ json: { ...site, prompt } }];

const profile = $json.profile || {};
const raw = $json.profile_yaml || '';
const site_id = $json.site_id;

if (!site_id) {
  throw new Error('Missing site_id');
}

const SITE_MAP = {
  sinabarimd: {
    slug: 'sinabarimd',
    domain: 'sinabarimd.com',
    canonical_url: 'https://sinabarimd.com/',
    deployPath: '/srv/sites/sinabarimd',
    verifyUrl: 'https://sinabarimd.com',
    openclawAgentId: 'publisher-sinabarimd',
    technicalSeoAgentId: 'technical-seo-sinabarimd',
    display_name: 'Sina Bari, MD',
    contact_email: 'sinabari@gmail.com',
    headshot_src: '/assets/headshot.png',
    headshot_alt: 'Sina Bari, MD',
    headshot_path: '/assets/headshot.png',
    template_id: 'homepage-v1',
    site_role: 'identity_hub',
    required_topic_tokens: ['sina bari', 'medical ai', 'current work'],
    forbidden_phrase_bundles: ['book a consultation', 'best plastic surgeon near me', 'schedule an appointment']
  },
  sinabari_net: {
    slug: 'sinabari-net',
    domain: 'sinabari.net',
    canonical_url: 'https://sinabari.net/',
    deployPath: '/srv/sites/sinabari-net',
    verifyUrl: 'https://sinabari.net',
    openclawAgentId: 'publisher-sinabari-net',
    technicalSeoAgentId: 'technical-seo-sinabari-net',
    display_name: 'Sina Bari',
    contact_email: 'sinabari@gmail.com',
    headshot_src: '/assets/headshot.png',
    headshot_alt: 'Sina Bari',
    headshot_path: '/assets/headshot.png',
    template_id: 'homepage-v1',
    site_role: 'ai_authority',
    required_topic_tokens: ['healthcare ai', 'medical ai', 'clinical workflow', 'governance'],
    forbidden_phrase_bundles: [
      'aesthetics philosophy',
      'plastic surgery',
      'facial rejuvenation',
      'cosmetic surgery',
      'selected media and speaking',
      'connect surgery aesthetics and healthcare technology'
    ]
  },
  drsinabari: {
    slug: 'drsinabari',
    domain: 'drsinabari.com',
    canonical_url: 'https://drsinabari.com/',
    deployPath: '/srv/sites/drsinabari',
    verifyUrl: 'https://drsinabari.com',
    openclawAgentId: 'publisher-drsinabari',
    technicalSeoAgentId: 'technical-seo-drsinabari',
    display_name: 'Dr. Sina Bari',
    contact_email: 'sinabari@gmail.com',
    headshot_src: '/assets/headshot.png',
    headshot_alt: 'Dr. Sina Bari',
    headshot_path: '/assets/headshot.png',
    template_id: 'homepage-v1',
    site_role: 'editorial',
    required_topic_tokens: ['essay', 'commentary', 'writing'],
    forbidden_phrase_bundles: ['book a consultation', 'healthcare ai thought leadership']
  },
  sinabariplasticsurgery: {
    slug: 'sinabariplasticsurgery',
    domain: 'sinabariplasticsurgery.com',
    canonical_url: 'https://sinabariplasticsurgery.com/',
    deployPath: '/srv/sites/sinabariplasticsurgery',
    verifyUrl: 'https://sinabariplasticsurgery.com',
    openclawAgentId: 'publisher-sinabariplasticsurgery',
    technicalSeoAgentId: 'technical-seo-sinabariplasticsurgery',
    display_name: 'Sina Bari, MD',
    contact_email: 'sinabari@gmail.com',
    headshot_src: '/assets/headshot.png',
    headshot_alt: 'Sina Bari, MD',
    headshot_path: '/assets/headshot.png',
    template_id: 'homepage-v1',
    site_role: 'legacy_specialty',
    required_topic_tokens: ['aesthetics', 'aging', 'rejuvenation'],
    forbidden_phrase_bundles: ['healthcare ai', 'enterprise ai', 'clinical workflow']
  }
};

const site = SITE_MAP[site_id];

if (!site) {
  throw new Error(`Unknown site_id: ${site_id}`);
}

return [
  {
    json: {
      site_id,
      ...site,
      profile_yaml: raw,
      profile,
      role: profile.role || '',
      objective: profile.objective || '',
      positioning: profile.positioning || '',
      allowed_topics: profile.allowed_topics || [],
      forbidden_topics: profile.forbidden_topics || [],
      primary_keywords: profile.primary_keywords || [],
      content_types: profile.content_types || [],
      core_pages: profile.core_pages || [],
      schema_type: (profile.schema || [])[0] || 'Person',
      tone: ['credible', 'restrained', 'expert', 'clear'],
      content_focus: profile.allowed_topics || [],
      content_rules: profile.forbidden_topics || [],
    }
  }
];
